name: MSI MAG A1000GL PCIE5 ATX 1000W Fully Modular Power Supply - 80 PLUS Gold Certified - ATX 3.1 Compatible - 135mm FDB Fan - Full-bridge LLC - 1x PCIe 5.1 16-Pin Connector - 4x PCIe 6+2-Pin Connectors (MAGA1000GLPCIE5)
